# Daily Creative Designs — LLM Context File
# https://dailycreativedesigns.com/llms.txt

## About

Daily Creative Designs is a professional design and digital marketing agency.
We help small businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs build powerful brands and online presence through strategic design and marketing.

## Services

- Logo Design: Custom, vector-based logos with full commercial ownership
- AI Website Design: Fast, modern websites built with AI-assisted tools
- Shopify Design: Custom Shopify storefronts optimised for conversions
- WordPress Design: Bespoke WordPress websites with performance and SEO focus
- Brand Identity: Complete brand systems including colours, typography, and guidelines
- Social Media Design: Templates, graphics, and visual assets for social platforms
- Digital Marketing: SEO, content strategy, and paid media management
